text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 116 

MME_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Medicare — Medicaid Eligibility Type Code: Annual Dual Eligibility Status 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the annual indicator of the beneficiary’s Medicare-Medicaid eligibility type code. CCW 
creates this variable using a hierarchy that is the maximum value of the monthly MME_TYPE_CD_MM. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF/T-MSIS DE file (derived) (derived) 

VALUES: 1 = Medicaid only —
